title: Agents, Workflows, and the Control Loop · State Clinic: Loop Invariants
summary: Compare a fixed workflow with an adaptive tool-using agent. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops loop invariants increment in an agent-system boundary map. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: State invariants that must hold before and after every loop iteration.
Define which effects occur in the model, host, tools, and external services.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
